name: tchak-studio
description: TCHAK – Système de certification d'authenticité pour artistes, offline-first

scripts.test:local: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('app/index.html') || !fs.existsSync('landing/index.html')) { console.error('Files missing'); process.exit(1); } console.log('All required files present.');"
